briefdescription.para: Maximum number of active sets.
Number of bits in register.
Maximum tap number.
Driver's minor version number.
Driver's major version number.
Initialises one instance of a channel filter driver.

detaileddescription.para: Traverses "/sys/bus/platform/device" directory (in Linux), to find registered CCF device with the name DeviceNodeName. The first available slot in the instances array XDfeCcf_ChFilter[] will be taken as a DeviceNodeName object. On success it moves the state machine to a Ready state, while on failure stays in a Not Ready state.

listitem.para: Pointer to the instance if successful.

briefdescription.para: Closes the instances of a channel filter driver and moves the state machine to a Not Ready state.
Resets channel filter and puts block into a reset state.
Reads configuration from device tree/xparameters.h and IP registers.

detaileddescription.para: Removes S/W reset and moves the state machine to a Configured state.

briefdescription.para: DFE Ccf driver one time initialisation, also moves the state machine to an Initialised state.
Activates channel filter and moves the state machine to an Activated state.
Deactivates channel filter and moves the state machine to Initialised state.
Gets a state machine state id.
Returns the current CC configuration in non-switchable mode.

detaileddescription.para: Not used slot ID in a sequence (Sequence.CCID[Index]) are represented as (-1), not the value in registers.

simplesect.para: For a sequence conversion see XDfeCcf_AddCCtoCCCfg() comment.

briefdescription.para: Returns the current CC configuration for Downlink and Uplink in switchable mode.

detaileddescription.para: Not used slot ID in a sequence (Sequence.CCID[Index]) are represented as (-1), not the value in registers.

briefdescription.para: Returns configuration structure CCCfg with CCCfg->Sequence.Length value set in XDfeCcf_Configure(), array CCCfg->Sequence.CCID[] members are set to not used value (-1) and the other CCCfg members are set to 0.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfeCcf *InstancePtr, XDfeCcf_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 *CCSeqBitmap, XDfeCcf_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfeCcf_GetCarrierCfg

briefdescription.para: Returns the current CCID carrier configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Channel ID for which configuration parameters are returned, range [0-15].

briefdescription.para: Set antenna configuration in CC configuration container.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfeCcf *InstancePtr, XDfeCcf_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 CCSeqBitmap, const XDfeCcf_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfeCcf_AddCCtoCCCfg

briefdescription.para: Adds specified CCID, with specified configuration, to a local CC configuration structure.

detaileddescription.para: If there is insufficient capacity for the new CC the function will return an error. Initiates CC update (enable CCUpdate trigger TUSER Single Shot).

The returned CCCfg.Sequence is translated as there is no explicit indication that SEQUENCE[i] is not used - 0 can define the slot as either used or not used. Sequence data that is returned in the CCIDSequence is not the same as what is written in the registers. The translation is:
CCIDSequence.CCID[i] = -1 - if [i] is unused slot
CCIDSequence.CCID[i] = CCID - if [i] is used slot
a returned CCIDSequence->Length = length in register + 1

briefdescription.para: Removes specified CCID from a local CC configuration structure.

parameterdescription.para: Channel ID to be removed, range [0-15].

simplesect.para: For a sequence conversion see XDfeCcf_AddCCtoCCCfg comment.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfeCcf *InstancePtr, XDfeCcf_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, const XDfeCcf_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfeCcf_UpdateCCinCCCfg

briefdescription.para: Updates specified CCID, with specified configuration to a local CC configuration structure.

detaileddescription.para: If there is insufficient capacity for the new CC the function will return an error.

parameterdescription.para: Channel ID to be updated, range [0-15].

briefdescription.para: Writes local CC configuration to the shadow (NEXT) registers and triggers copying from shadow to operational (CURRENT) registers.
Writes local CC configuration to the shadow (NEXT) registers and triggers copying from shadow to operational (CURRENT) registers for both Downlink and Upling in switchable mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfeCcf *InstancePtr, s32 CCID, u32 CCSeqBitmap, const XDfeCcf_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfeCcf_AddCC

briefdescription.para: Adds specified CCID, with specified configuration.

detaileddescription.para: If there is insufficient capacity for the new CC the function will return an error. Initiates CC update (enable CCUpdate trigger TUSER Single Shot).

parameterdescription.para: - up to 16 defined slots into which a CC can be allocated. The number of slots can be from 1 to 16 depending on system initialization. The number of slots is defined by the "sequence length" parameter which is provided during initialization. The Bit offset within the CCSeqBitmap indicates the equivalent Slot number to allocate. e.g. 0x0003 means the caller wants the passed component carrier (CC) to be allocated to slots 0 and 1.

simplesect.para: Clear event status with XDfeCcf_ClearEventStatus() before running this API.

: This API is deprecated in the release 2023.2. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with the following API sequence: XDfeCcf_GetCurrentCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg); XDfeCcf_AddCCtoCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg, CCID, CCSeqBitmap, CarrierCfg); XDfeCcf_SetNextCCCfgAndTrigger(InstancePtr, CCCfg);

briefdescription.para: Removes specified CCID.

detaileddescription.para: Initiates CC update (enable CCUpdate trigger TUSER Single Shot).

simplesect.para: Clear event status with XDfeCcf_ClearEventStatus() before running this API.

: This API is deprecated in the release 2023.2. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with the following API sequence: XDfeCcf_GetCurrentCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg); XDfeCcf_RemoveCCfromCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg, CCID); XDfeCcf_SetNextCCCfgAndTrigger(InstancePtr, CCCfg);

briefdescription.para: Updates specified CCID carrier configuration; change gain or filter coefficients set.

detaileddescription.para: Initiates CC update (enable CCUpdate trigger TUSER Single Shot).

simplesect.para: Clear event status with XDfeCcf_ClearEventStatus() before running this API.

: This API is deprecated in the release 2023.2. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with the following API sequence: XDfeCcf_GetCurrentCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg); XDfeCcf_UpdateCCinCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg, CCID, CarrierCfg); XDfeCcf_SetNextCCCfgAndTrigger(InstancePtr, CCCfg);

briefdescription.para: Updates specified antenna TDM slot enablement.

detaileddescription.para: Initiates CC update (enable CCUpdate trigger one-shot).

parameterdescription.para: Flag indicating enable status of the antenna.

simplesect.para: Clear event status with XDfeCcf_ClearEventStatus() before running this API.

briefdescription.para: Updates antenna configuration to all antennas.

simplesect.para: Clear event status with XDfeCcf_ClearEventStatus() before running this API.

briefdescription.para: Updates antenna configuration of all antennas.

detaileddescription.para: Applies gain to downlink only in switchable mode.

parameterdescription.para: Array of all downlink antenna configurations.
Array of all uplink antenna configurations.

simplesect.para: Clear event status with XDfeCcf_ClearEventStatus() before running this API.

briefdescription.para: Returns current trigger configuration.
Sets trigger configuration.
Gets specified CCID carrier configuration.
Returns a list indicating which coefficient sets are currently in use.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfeCcf *InstancePtr, u32 Set, u32 Shift, const XDfeCcf_Coefficients *Coeffs)
memberdef.name: XDfeCcf_LoadCoefficients

briefdescription.para: Writes the coefficient set defined into the register map and commit them to the hard block's internal coefficient memory for the specified Set.
Sets the delay, which will be added to TUSER and TLAST (delay matched through the IP).
Reads the delay, which will be added to TUSER and TLAST (delay matched through the IP).

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfeCcf *InstancePtr, u32 Tap, s32 CCID, u32 Symmetric, u32 Num, u32 *TDataDelay)
memberdef.name: XDfeCcf_GetTDataDelay

briefdescription.para: Gets calculated TDataDelay value for CCID from current CC configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfeCcf *InstancePtr, u32 Tap, s32 CCID, XDfeCcf_CCCfg *CCCfg, u32 Symmetric, u32 Num, u32 *TDataDelay)
memberdef.name: XDfeCcf_GetTDataDelayFromCCCfg

briefdescription.para: Gets calculated TDataDelay value for CCID.
Sets uplink/downlink register bank.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the Channel Filter instance.
Register bank value to be set.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current operational state of CCF.
This API is used to get the driver version.
Contains the APIs for DFE Channel Filter component.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 dc 10/29/20 Initial version dc 02/02/21 Remove hard coded device node name dc 02/08/21 align driver to current specification dc 02/22/21 include HW in versioning dc 03/16/21 update activate & deactivate api dc 03/25/21 Device tree item name change dc 04/06/21 Register with full node name dc 04/07/21 Fix bare metal initialisation dc 04/08/21 Set sequence length only once dc 04/18/21 Update trigger and event handlers dc 04/20/21 Doxygen documentation update dc 04/22/21 Add write MappedId field dc 05/08/21 Update to common trigger dc 05/18/21 Handling CCUpdate trigger 1.1 dc 07/13/21 Update to common latency requirements dc 07/21/21 Add and reorganise examples dc 10/26/21 Make driver R5 compatible 1.2 dc 10/29/21 Update doxygen comments dc 11/01/21 Add multi AddCC, RemoveCC and UpdateCC dc 11/19/21 Update doxygen documentation dc 11/26/21 Model parameter NumCCPerAntenna workaround dc 11/26/21 Set sequence length in GetEmptyCCCfg dc 11/26/21 Add SetAntennaCfgInCCCfg API dc 11/30/21 Convert AntennaCfg to structure dc 12/02/21 Add UpdateAntennaCfg API dc 12/17/21 Update after documentation review 1.3 dc 01/07/22 Zero-padding coefficients dc 01/19/22 Assert CCUpdate trigger dc 01/21/22 Symmetric filter Zero-padding dc 01/27/22 Get calculated TDataDelay dc 01/31/22 CCF IP MODEL_PARAM register change dc 03/21/22 Add prefix to global variables 1.4 dc 04/08/22 Update documentation 1.5 dc 10/28/22 Switching Uplink/Downlink support dc 11/11/22 Align AddCC to switchable UL/DL algorithm dc 11/25/22 Update macro of SW version Minor number 1.6 dc 06/15/23 Function comment update dc 06/20/23 Deprecate obsolete APIs cog 07/04/23 Add support for SDT dc 08/29/23 Remove immediate trigger 1.7 cog 02/02/24 Yocto SDT support dc 03/01/24 Update version number in makefiles 1.9 dc 10/16/25 Fix zero padding and GetActivSets 1.10 dc 12/10/25 Add IsCcfOperational API dc 02/18/26 Correct spelling errors dc 03/08/26 Correct compiler warnings
